title: Sewing
description: Adds Sewing to the game, this mod is still wip, so it's not the best yet
body:
### [This Project is still WIP]
# Sewing!
adds Sewing to the game by adding a sewing needle you can right click and if you got any fabric(another new type of item with 16 different colours) in your off-hand it gives you a new item which is specified by which colour of fabric


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
